scripts.build:client: cd client && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.postbuild: node -e "const f=require('fs'),s=require('path');const src=s.join('client','dist'),dest=s.join('server','public');if(f.existsSync(dest))f.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true});f.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Copied client build to server/public')"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install && cd .. && npm run postbuild
